name: NT8000 - SIRIUS
desc: This linked card cannot be destroyed by battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "NT8000 - SIRIUS" once per turn. During the turn a Link Monster's effect was activated (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up card you control and 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy both. If this card is sent to the GY, except from the field, and you control a DARK Link Monster: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field.
mnst_eff: This linked card cannot be destroyed by battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "NT8000 - SIRIUS" once per turn. During the turn a Link Monster's effect was activated (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up card you control and 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy both. If this card is sent to the GY, except from the field, and you control a DARK Link Monster: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field.
eff: This linked card cannot be destroyed by battle. You can only use each of the following effects of "NT8000 - SIRIUS" once per turn. During the turn a Link Monster's effect was activated (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up card you control and 1 face-up card your opponent controls; destroy both. If this card is sent to the GY, except from the field, and you control a DARK Link Monster: You can Special Summon this card, but banish it when it leaves the field.

action: Activates if sent to the Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
